# DATPAQ User Avatar API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready SPA demonstrating the DATPAQ User Avatar API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://www.datpaq.com/docs/user-avatar
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: /v1/user-avatar
- Machine-readable API guide: /openai.json
- Expanded LLM guidance: /llms-full.txt

## What this app demonstrates
- Avatar image generation from `name` and optional styling parameters.
- Required API key input (`x-api-key`) with form validation.
- Loading, empty, error, and success UX states.
- Copyable request URL and copyable JSON response metadata block.

## Authentication
- Header required: `x-api-key: <your_api_key>`

## Response behavior
- API returns image content (PNG, WebP, or SVG) depending on query and defaults.
- Sample app converts the image response into a browser preview and exposes metadata as JSON.
